Multiple burst reads of variable length and bit width 32 in loop 'READ_X'(../src/spmv_csr.cpp:23:5) has been inferred on bundle 'gmem3'. These burst requests might be further partitioned into multiple requests during RTL generation, based on max_read_burst_length or max_write_burst_length settings. (../src/spmv_csr.cpp:23:5)

Multiple burst writes of variable length and bit width 32 in loop 'L1'(../src/spmv_csr.cpp:29:5) has been inferred on bundle 'gmem4'. Design contains AXI ports. Reset is fixed to synchronous and active low.
